title: Wing de-icer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|wing|more=ice (disambiguation)}}
'''Wing de-icers''' were used on [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]] when entering cold climates that could freeze the wings of the spacecraft.

When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] traveled to a cold area of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[R7-T1]] requested that he keep them applied on atmospheric entry.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''
